About Us

Our Story

Building confident athletes through grace, strength, and dedication.

Meet Coach Ella Rasin

With over 15 years of experience in rhythmic gymnastics, Coach Ella founded Rhythmic Ribbon of Texas to share her passion for this beautiful sport with the McKinney community.

A USAG certified coach and former competitive gymnast, Ella believes in nurturing each athlete's individual potential while fostering a love for movement and self-expression.

"Every child deserves the chance to discover their inner grace and strength. Rhythmic gymnastics isn't just about competition - it's about building confidence that lasts a lifetime."

— Coach Ella
  • ✓ USAG Certified Coach
  • ✓ 15+ Years Experience
  • ✓ Former Competitive Gymnast
  • ✓ CPR/First Aid Certified

Our Facility

Rhythmic Ribbon of Texas
4260 Eldorado Parkway
McKinney, TX 75070

Our state-of-the-art facility features professional-grade equipment, ample training space, and a welcoming environment designed specifically for rhythmic gymnastics training.

  • • Professional rhythmic gymnastics flooring
  • • Full apparatus collection (ribbon, hoop, ball, clubs, rope)
  • • Ballet barres and mirrors
  • • Comfortable parent viewing area
  • • Safe, clean environment

Ready to Start Your Journey?

Book a free trial class and discover the magic of rhythmic gymnastics.
